description: M29 expanded Monte Carlo pass for standard-DW versus robust-DW comparison with chi-square cutoffs as the primary applied benchmark.

scenarios.name: no_noise
scenarios.label: No noise, strong moments
scenarios.note: Sanity case for standard-DW and robust-DW agreement.

scenarios.name: moderate_noise
scenarios.label: Moderate Gaussian noise
scenarios.note: The M0020 moderate-noise column with informative higher moments.

scenarios.name: high_noise
scenarios.label: High Gaussian noise
scenarios.note: The M0020 stress column where standard DW rejects true B0 under chi-square guides.

scenarios.name: weak_moments
scenarios.label: Weak structural higher moments
scenarios.note: Companion-grid limitation case: robust DW should widen as higher moments weaken.

scenarios.name: skewed_residual_noise
scenarios.label: Skewed residual noise
scenarios.note: Misspecified-noise stress case that violates the maintained Gaussian-noise route.
